cos(arcsin t)=√(1−t²) ( |t|<1 ).

dw/dt = d/dt [t³] · √(1−t²) + t³ · d/dt [√(1−t²)]

= 3t²√(1−t²) + t³ · (½)(1−t²)^(−½)(−2t)

       = (3t² − 4t⁴) / √(1−t²)
